home.heroTitle: See the world on a budget
home.heroSubtitle: No hype—just real budgets and routes. Plan with confidence.
home.sloganRationale: For us, budget travel is not cheap travel. Carry less, experience more — use wisdom over money and courage over comfort.
home.sloganAlt3En: Budget is Limited, Dreams are Not.
home.sloganAlt3Zh: Your budget has limits, your dreams do not.
home.sloganAlt4Zh: Travel as a true global citizen.

seo.title: Budget Travel World · Less Luggage, More Life.
seo.description: Less Luggage, More Life — budget travel guides, destinations, routes, and honest tips so you can explore further with confidence.
seo.keywords: budget travel,backpacking,Less Luggage More Life,travel guides,destinations,routes

footer.taglineSub: See the world on a budget. Every trip deserves to be taken seriously.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Budget Travel World. All rights reserved.

about.title: About · Guidelines
about.introBody: Budget Travel World is built for the young generation, budget travelers and travel lovers. We aim to be a small, focused global site: niche, refined, and as professional as we can be. We don’t compete with big travel platforms; instead we focus on people who care about saving money, controlling budgets, exploring cultures, sharing experiences, and staying rational about spending—spreading the joy of budget travel across borders.
about.guidelinesBody: No vulgar language, political attacks, or discrimination based on faith or religion. Violations will be removed. You’re welcome to share experiences, tips, or complaints on the message board and help keep this space friendly.
